---
title: "DAII 3.5 Pipeline Controller"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    theme: flatly
    vertical_layout: fill
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(shiny)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)

# Set working directory
setwd("C:/Users/sganesan/DAII-3.5-Framework")

# Source the pipeline
source("DAII_3.5_TEST_232_COMPANIES_FINALFIXED_VERSION_5.3_WITH_DATA_INGESTION_INTEGRATION_3_18_2026.r")
```

Sidebar {.sidebar}
=======================================================================

### 🎮 Pipeline Controls

```{r}
radioButtons("run_mode", "Run Mode:",
  choices = c("Full Pipeline (All Companies)" = "full",
              "Custom Tickers" = "custom"),
  selected = "full")

textAreaInput("custom_tickers", "Custom Tickers (comma-separated):",
  value = "NVDA,MSFT,AAPL,GOOGL,META",
  rows = 3,
  placeholder = "Enter tickers separated by commas")

fileInput("csv_file", "Or Upload CSV:",
  accept = c(".csv"))

hr()

h4("⚙️ Advanced Settings")

checkboxInput("use_custom_weights", "Use custom AI weights", value = FALSE)

conditionalPanel(
  condition = "input.use_custom_weights == true",
  sliderInput("weight_rd", "R&D Weight:", min = 0, max = 0.5, value = 0.30, step = 0.05),
  sliderInput("weight_patent", "Patent Weight:", min = 0, max = 0.5, value = 0.30, step = 0.05),
  sliderInput("weight_growth", "Growth Weight:", min = 0, max = 0.5, value = 0.20, step = 0.05),
  sliderInput("weight_stability", "Stability Weight:", min = 0, max = 0.5, value = 0.20, step = 0.05)
)

hr()

actionButton("run_pipeline", "🚀 Run Pipeline", class = "btn-primary btn-lg", width = "100%")
```

Pipeline Control
=======================================================================

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Execution Status

```{r}
status_text <- reactiveVal("Ready to run")

observeEvent(input$run_pipeline, {
  status_text("⏳ Pipeline running... This may take several minutes")
  
  # Get tickers based on mode
  tickers_to_run <- NULL
  
  if(input$run_mode == "custom") {
    if(!is.null(input$csv_file)) {
      csv_data <- read.csv(input$csv_file$datapath)
      tickers_to_run <- csv_data$ticker
    } else {
      tickers_to_run <- trimws(strsplit(input$custom_tickers, ",")[[1]])
    }
  }
  
  # Build weights if custom
  weights_list <- NULL
  if(input$use_custom_weights) {
    weights_list <- list(
      rd = input$weight_rd,
      patent = input$weight_patent,
      growth = input$weight_growth,
      stability = input$weight_stability
    )
  }
  
  # Run pipeline (simplified - adapt to your actual pipeline)
  tryCatch({
    # Call your pipeline function here
    # result <- run_daii_pipeline(tickers = tickers_to_run, weights = weights_list)
    
    status_text("✅ Pipeline completed successfully!")
  }, error = function(e) {
    status_text(paste("❌ Error:", e$message))
  })
})
```

```{r}
renderText({ status_text() })
```

### Latest Run Results

```{r}
output$run_info <- renderUI({
  run_dirs <- list.files("outputs", pattern = "run_", full.names = TRUE)
  if(length(run_dirs) > 0) {
    latest <- run_dirs[which.max(file.info(run_dirs)$mtime)]
    run_time <- file.info(latest)$mtime
    
    div(class = "panel panel-success",
      div(class = "panel-heading", "📁 Latest Run"),
      div(class = "panel-body",
        p(strong("Run ID:"), basename(latest)),
        p(strong("Completed:"), format(run_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")),
        p(strong("Status:"), span("✅ Success", style = "color: green"))
      )
    )
  } else {
    div(class = "panel panel-warning",
      div(class = "panel-body", "No pipeline runs found. Click Run Pipeline to start.")
    )
  }
})
```

```{r}
renderUI({ output$run_info })
```
